vulnerabilities.name: Missing Security Header: HSTS
vulnerabilities.description: The HTTP response does not contain the 'Strict-Transport-Security' security header.
vulnerabilities.evidence: Header 'Strict-Transport-Security' is missing from the response.
vulnerabilities.remediation: Configure your web server or application framework to include the 'Strict-Transport-Security' header in all nulls.

vulnerabilities.name: Missing Security Header: X-Content-Type-Options
vulnerabilities.description: The HTTP response does not contain the 'X-Content-Type-Options' security header.
vulnerabilities.evidence: Header 'X-Content-Type-Options' is missing from the response.
vulnerabilities.remediation: Configure your web server or application framework to include the 'X-Content-Type-Options' header in all nulls.
